channel.title: Conor Byrne Pub — Sunday Open Mic
channel.description: Upcoming events for Conor Byrne Pub — Sunday Open Mic

item.title: Conor Byrne Pub — Sunday Open Mic
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 5140 Ballard Ave NW, Seattle

Weekly open mic at one of Seattle's most storied venues. Free to sign up, first come first served.

Event details
